name: Monster Hunting: Incremental Grind Forever
short_description: An idle incremental adventure. Fight monsters, buy upgrades, recruit a party, craft equipment, join a faction, battle across different regions, and complete hundreds of rewards. Unlock a variety of fun features and use them to make your numbers go up!
detailed_description:
An idle incremental adventure, and a smorgasbord of numbers that go up!

  • Fight monsters.
  • Buy upgrades.
  • Fight even more monsters.
  • Buy even more upgrades.
  • Recruit party members, monsters, and even boss monsters.
  • Craft and enhance equipment.
  • Make your main character stronger with base camps, temperaments, masteries, affinities and more.
  • Enhance your party members with latent boosts, friendship boosts, void boosts, bonus boosts and more.
  • Start a new mission (prestige) and collect 3 different resources, which can be used to hire help, buy more upgrades or to enhance equipment.
  • Battle across 12 different regions, each with its own set of rewards.
  • Join a faction, craft Faction Medallions and earn Faction rewards.
  • A little over 1800 in-game rewards to earn, each of which comes with a small stat bonus.
  • Unlock new features and new challenges all the way up to level 900!
  • Offline progress through the Time Bank. Offline minutes are added to the bank and can be used to simulate game time at your leisure.
